name: Fettucini Romano Ala Fratelli
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the olive oil to a hot 10-inch pan.
2. Add the garlic and sauté over high heat for about 1 minute.
3. Add the white wine and simmer for about 2 minutes.
4. Add the half-and-half and allow the sauce to come back to the simmer.
5. Add the Romano cheese and stir until smooth, about 2 minutes.
6. To serve, add the cooked fettuccine to the pan and toss until coated.
7. Portion onto two plates and garnish with some chopped parsley.
